response:
Sec. 1  
In 2019, the Chief Minister of Andhra Pradesh was Chandrababu Naidu. He was leading the Telugu Desam Party during that time. His government was focused on infrastructure and development projects.

Sec. 2  
Chandrababu Naidu was elected as the Chief Minister in 2019  
He led the state with a clear vision for growth  
His policies aimed at improving education and healthcare  

***  
Andhra Pradesh had a stable government under his leadership  
He worked closely with the central government on key issues  
His tenure was marked by economic reforms and modernization  

***  
Naidu's administration prioritized digital initiatives  
He launched several IT and tech-related projects  
These efforts aimed at making the state more competitive  

Sec. 3  
Chandrababu Naidu remained in power until the next elections  
His leadership was supported by a majority in the state legislature  
He focused on maintaining peace and development across the state.
